basic.description:
{Basic Estates}

With Basic Estates, a hero contributes 250 gold per day to the team's economy and improves Marketplace exchange rates as if the hero's team had 1 additional Marketplace.

advanced.description:
{Advanced Estates}

With Advanced Estates, a hero contributes 500 gold per day to the team's economy and improves Marketplace exchange rates as if the hero's team had 2 additional Marketplaces.

expert.description:
{Expert Estates}

With Expert Estates, a hero contributes 1000 gold per day to the team's economy and improves Marketplace exchange rates as if the hero's team had 3 additional Marketplaces.
